inputs.description: Use the planting layout and selected crops to scope which beds require soil analysis and amendments before planting dates.
Derive target fertility ranges (pH and NPK bands) from crop families and planting windows.
Optionally tighten or relax fertility targets based on desired yield intensity per bed.

outputs.description: Provide per-bed stability ratings and yield modifiers to adjust harvest predictions up or down.
Flag beds as constrained until amendments are applied, so yield calculations can reflect realistic limits.
Insert soil amendment sessions as required pre-plant tasks that must be scheduled before sowing or transplant dates.
Enable one-tap 'Now' sessions from the garden domain to execute soil amendment work with timers and step guidance.
Expose long-term soil stability trends to storehouse planning so preserved food targets can account for future yield risk.
